bio: We are a collective of thinkers who seek to unravel the mysteries of the universe. Believing that our perceptions shape reality, we delve into the depths of consciousness, exploring the intricate dance between the self and the unknown.
name: New_Genesis_67_Orthodox_72_Orthodox_84_Reformed_85_Reformed_87
ideology:
賢者3:  Projectionism**

Thought A (Intentionalism): There is a inherent intention or meaning in the shadow realm, beyond our own consciousness.

Thought B (Projectionism): The intentions and meanings we perceive are solely projections of our own minds and consciousness.
